prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and high caloric intake (3500+ calories) with meals timed around 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 3500+ calories appropriate for endurance athlete
Includes carbohydrate-rich meals strategically timed before, during, and after the 2-hour training window
All meals comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for single-day reference)
task_description: Write a compact concise one day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading with specific timing around training windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength gains and recovery for dual training sessions (morning strength work and evening power work)

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans one full day with at least 4 eating occasions distributed to support two training sessions
Protein distributed across meals with minimum 25-30g per eating occasion to optimize muscle protein synthesis
Includes pre/post-workout nutrition timing for both morning and evening training sessions
Total daily calories and macronutrient targets appropriate for a 82kg strength athlete in a training surplus
task_description: Write a compact concise one day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution and recovery nutrition across multiple daily training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan is structured for one full day with distinct meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
All foods comply with both vegan and gluten-free restrictions
Plan includes adequate carbohydrates and protein to support football training and recovery
Plan is concise and compact, suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact concise one day meal plan for a single athlete.
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction scenario (e.g., vegan footballer or gluten-free swimmer) to verify the plan adapts to constraints while maintaining athletic performance nutrition
